package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for gorm_model_outside_models_package: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: GORM-backed structs with `gorm` tags declared outside `model` or `models` packages unless an explicit `entity` or `schema` package already exists.
type CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageModel
}

type CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageService struct {
    repo *CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGormModelOutsideModelsPackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageDTO) error {
    focus := "gorm_model_outside_models_package"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    gorm_model_outside_models_package_negative := map[string]int{"gorm": 1, "model": 2, "outside": 3, "models": 4, "package": 5}
    gorm_model_outside_models_package_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gorm_negative_0 := db.Where("gorm_id = ?", input)
    _ = gorm_negative_0
    model_negative_1 := CaseGormModelOutsideModelsPackageDTO{ID: input, Status: "model"}
    _ = model_negative_1
    outside_negative_2 := gorm_model_outside_models_package_negative["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_negative_2
    models_negative_3 := gorm_model_outside_models_package_negative["models"] + len(input)
    _ = models_negative_3
    package_negative_4 := gorm_model_outside_models_package_negative["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_negative_4
    return nil
}
